data.title: EARTHDAY.ORG PARTNERS WITH OAAA TO BRING EARTH DAY 2026 MESSAGE TO MILLIONS ACROSS AMERICA
data.description: For the eighth consecutive year, EARTHDAY.ORG has collaborated with Out... to promote "Our Power, Our Planet™" through billboards, transit, and digital displays across the nation. The partnership was confirmed on April 23, 2026. EARTHDAY.ORG, known for its influence on Earth Day, has continued its alliance with Out... reaching a larger audience each year. This partnership aims to raise awareness about environmental issues and promote sustainable practices.

data.title: CPSC Posts Product Recalls to its Web Site
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Washington, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) revealed several recalls done in collaboration with specific companies. These recalls, accessible at www.cpsc.gov, involved Lil Pick Up recalling a batch of Youth All-Terrain Vehicles (ATVs) due to safety concerns. The CPSC urges consumers to check the website for more details on the recalled products for their safety.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- SafeLease/
data.description: SafeLease has recently announced the launch of a Specialty Self-Storage Insurance Program for Retail Agents and Brokers across the country. The company revealed on 23-Apr-2026 that the insurance coverage will be offered through surplus lines / non-admitted basis, utilizing licensed professionals. This program presents a new opportunity for agents and brokers to tap into this niche market segment.

data.title: ACNB Corporation Reports 2026 First Quarter Financial Results
data.description: ACNB Corporation reported a net income of $13.7 million, equivalent to $1.32 diluted earnings per share, for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. This marks a significant improvement compared to a net loss of $272 thousand, or $0.03 diluted loss per share, for the same period in 2025. In addition, it exceeded the net income of $10.8 million, or $1.04 diluted earnings per share, reported for the quarter ending on December 31, 2025. ACNB serves as the financial holding company for ACNB Bank and ACNB Insurance Services, Inc., and is publicly traded on NASDAQ under the symbol ACNB.

data.description: Tether, a stablecoin issuer, revealed that it collaborated with authorities in the United States to execute one of its most significant asset freezes to date.

data.title: In HelloNation, Painting Expert Christie Barnum of Vinings Explains Why Ceramic Coatings Are Ideal for Brick and Masonry Homes in Humid Climates
data.description: In Vinings, Georgia, a recent article by HelloNation highlights the advantages of ceramic coatings for brick homes in the humid climate of the area. Painting Expert Christie Barnum from Rhino Shield by Georgia Coatings, Inc. explains the benefits of these coatings in safeguarding homes.

data.title: CPSC Posts Product Safety Warnings to its Web Site
data.description: In Washington on April 23, 2026, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) issued product safety warnings regarding the Bauhini SDADI Kitchen Step. Consumers are advised to immediately cease using this product. Detailed information on product safety warnings and recalls can be found at www.cpsc.gov. It is crucial for consumers to take prompt action to ensure their safety as per the CPSC's announcement.

data.title: Heard Releases Fourth Annual Financial State of Private Practice Report, Surveying Nearly 2,000 Therapists on Income, Taxes, and the Cost of Running a Practice
data.description: In Seattle, Heard, a financial management platform designed for therapists in private practice, has unveiled its fourth annual Financial State of Private Practice report. The report, compiled from surveys completed by almost 2,000 mental health professionals in all 50 states and D.C., provides an extensive overview of therapists' earnings, expenditures, and business operations. In 2025, median revenue soared to $80,412, showcasing a significant rise from previous years.

data.title: Lululemon Athletica New CEO Pick Triggers Transition Jitters, Stock Slides
data.description: Lululemon Athletica Inc. (NASDAQ: LULU) saw a decrease in shares following the announcement of Heidi O'Neill as the new CEO, effective September 8, 2026. O'Neill, a former Nike Inc. (NYSE: NKE) executive, will succeed interim co-CEOs Meghan Frank and André Maestrini. The board is confident in O'Neill's potential to lead growth and innovation. Founder Chip Wilson had previously urged for changes in leadership, expressing concerns over governance and strategic alignment within the company. The market reacted negatively to the CEO transition, causing uncertainty among investors about the impact on the company's trajectory.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Sleep Corner/
data.description: Sleep Corner has recently announced a partnership with Stealth Health and Metabolic Code to enhance the availability of comprehensive sleep care services across the country. The collaboration aims to expand access to proven end-to-end sleep solutions on a national scale. This partnership signifies a significant step forward in improving sleep health, with the combined expertise of the organizations. The announcement was made on 23-Apr-2026 via a news release issued by Sleep Corner through PR Newswire. This initiative is poised to benefit a large number of individuals seeking effective sleep care, with the joint efforts of the companies.

data.title: Latin America Data Center Construction Market to Exceed USD 6.93 Billion by 2031, Supported by Google's $500M Digital Port Investment - Arizton
data.description: Chicago, April 23, 2026 - A recent industry analysis report by Arizton forecasts significant growth in the Latin America data center construction market, with expectations to reach USD 6.93 billion by 2031. The report covers regional outlook, growth potential, price trends, competitive market share, and a forecast for the period of 2026-2031.

data.title: White House Correspondents' Dinner: Hollywood stars, reporters, and politicians gather for press freedom in annual black-tie event.
data.description: Every year, a prestigious black-tie affair draws the attention of Hollywood celebrities, journalists, and government officials, gathering for a night filled with humor and reverence for the importance of press freedom.

data.title: OnePay Launches Builder Card, a Smarter Way for Millions to Build Credit Without Late Fees or Interest
data.description: New York, April 23, 2026 - A recent development in the financial landscape offers a solution to the credit challenges faced by many Americans, particularly the younger demographic. This innovative approach eliminates the need for credit checks, revolving debt, and late or monthly fees. With no credit history, numerous individuals are often rejected when seeking credit opportunities. However, this new system presents a way forward for these individuals. This advancement is poised to benefit millions, helping them establish credit without the traditional hindrances, offering a pathway to financial progress.

data.title: NOYZ UNVEILS "BE HER" EAU DE PARFUM IN PARTNERSHIP WITH ELLA LANGLEY
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Los Angeles, renowned fragrance brand NOYZ revealed an unprecedented collaboration with popular country singer Ella Langley. This unique partnership resulted in the creation of Be Her Eau de Parfum, a scent that encapsulates the essence of Langley's chart-topping music. The fragrance is set to captivate consumers with its innovative approach to blending musical inspiration with olfactory artistry.
